reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/10866130483095140789/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKWE1VMUVaek16VkRabFgzQnNlRTR3WkUxa1JtYxAB

reviews.comment: Coffee Island is a great place for coffee lovers. The coffee quality is very nice and strong, and the presentation is excellent. The staff is polite, friendly, and always ready to help customers. The café has a comfortable ambiance where you can relax, work, or spend time with friends. Food options are also tasty and fresh. Overall, it’s a wonderful coffee experience. Highly recommended for anyone who enjoys good coffee. ☕✨

reviewReply.comment: Thank you! We're so happy you had a great coffee experience. Can’t wait to have you back - there’s always more to discover!

reviews.comment: Loved the fluffy blueberry pancake. Amazing coffee and even better service! Yuvraj was incredibly welcoming and made the whole experience great. Definitely my new favorite spot.

reviewReply.comment: Happy to know you enjoyed your time with us. We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet expectations. We hope you’ll consider giving us another try. We’d love the chance to make it right and offer you the experience Coffee Island is known for.
Please DM us your contact details on Instagram at @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly.
